hero.description: We build tools that handle the tedious parts of content publishing so you can focus on the work that actually matters: telling your story, your way.
problem.heading: Creating great content isn’t the hard part.
problem.p1: The hard part is everything that comes after: resizing for every platform, writing captions that land, formatting carousels, keeping your brand voice consistent across channels. The busywork eats the hours you should spend making things.
problem.p2.before: Meanwhile, fully automated AI tools promise to "do it all for you" and strip out the one thing that makes your content yours:
mission.heading: Keep Humans in the Creative Driver’s Seat
mission.description: KodaPost exists to keep you in control. We handle the tedious, time-consuming parts of content publishing: formatting, captioning, and cross-platform adaptation, so you can focus on telling your story, your way.
mission.quote: AI should be your production assistant, not your ghostwriter.
mission.quoteCaption: Every headline Koda suggests is a starting point that you shape, refine, and approve. Nothing publishes without your say-so.
values.heading: What We Believe
values.0.title: Creators Own Their Voice
values.0.description: AI generates options. You make the decisions. Your audience follows you for your perspective, and we protect that.
values.1.title: Busywork Is the Enemy of Craft
values.1.description: Formatting a phonographic carousel shouldn't take longer than the idea behind it. We automate the mechanics so you can invest in the meaning.
values.2.title: Tools Should Be Transparent
values.2.description: You always see what Koda is doing and why. No black-box publishing, no surprise edits, no hidden algorithms shaping your content.
values.3.title: Great Content Is Human Content
values.3.description: The best posts have fingerprints on them: imperfect, opinionated, real. We're here to polish, not to homogenize.
howItWorks.heading: Four steps. You’re in control the whole way.
howItWorks.steps.0.title: Upload Your Images
howItWorks.steps.0.description: Bring your photos and tell Koda what your post is about.
howItWorks.steps.1.title: Koda Generates Options
howItWorks.steps.1.description: Headlines, captions, and layouts tailored to your vibe and platform.
howItWorks.steps.2.title: You Review & Refine
howItWorks.steps.2.description: Edit text, adjust styling, crop images, and tweak filters until it feels right.
howItWorks.steps.3.title: Publish Directly
howItWorks.steps.3.description: To Instagram, Telegram, and more, or export on your own schedule.
team.heading: Built by Creators
team.description: KodaPost is built by creators who got tired of the gap between having a great idea and getting it out into the world. We’re a small, independent team focused on one thing: making the content pipeline faster without making it feel less human.
philosophy.p1: KodaPost is built on the belief that the best creative tools keep humans in the loop. KodaPost never takes over. It works alongside you, handling the tedious parts so you can focus on what matters: your story.
philosophy.p2: Every caption, every filter, every crop is a suggestion you can accept, modify, or reject. Your creative vision stays front and center. KodaPost is the assistant, never the artist.
philosophy.p3: We believe authentic content comes from real people making real choices, not from fully automated pipelines. That’s why every KodaPost phonographic carousel is a collaboration between you and your AI-powered creative assistant. Creator Provenance goes further, embedding your authorship directly into every export so your work stays yours.
cta.heading: Questions? Let’s Talk.
cta.description: Feedback, partnership ideas, or just want to say hi? We’d love to hear from you.
